rag_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations in AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
generic_rules: Guard previous-value comparisons with an initialized state variable
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE
Declare visible identifiers before referencing them in AGREE annexes
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing AADL property names as AGREE variables
Do not assume type consistency without explicit declaration
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics with syntax errors
Subcomponent port usage in type contracts
